name: architecture-flow
description: Local/offline React Flow architecture diagram renderer for gitnexus-codex-wiki scaffold output.
license_notes: Bundle includes React, ReactDOM, @xyflow/react, and @dagrejs/dagre runtime dependencies from npm package versions listed here.
Generated architecture-web sites are static/offline and load only local assets/architecture-flow.js and assets/architecture-flow.css.
Retain upstream package license notices when distributing the generated bundle beyond local documentation outputs.
